title: VLANs, Trunks, STP, Aggregation, and MTU · Fault Triage
summary: Segment a campus switch fabric for staff, voice, guest, management, and redundant uplinks. Learners isolate plausible failures, compare competing hypotheses, and record cause-level repair evidence. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in a verified switched campus configuration plan and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Create VLANs and assign access interfaces while matching documentation, endpoint purpose, and broadcast-domain boundaries.
Configure 802.1Q trunks, allowed VLANs, native VLAN, and voice VLAN behavior without mismatch or leakage.
Explain switch virtual interfaces for management or Layer 3 gateways and the dependencies for an SVI to become operational.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.shell:
# comptia-network-plus safe operations evidence notebook
# Commands run only in the deterministic browser simulator.
# Add one observation, command, expected signal, and conclusion per activity.
